div1.entryFree:
Abridgement, 1) a summary, short account, abstract: this brief a. of my will I make, Lucr. 1198. then brook a. H5 V, Chor. Lucr. 1198 this fierce a. hath to it circumstantial branches, Cymb. V, 5, 382.
2) that which makes time short, pastime: what a. have you for this evening? Mids. V, 39. look where my a. comes, Hml. II, 2, 439. (that which is my pastime and makes me be brief. Ff --s come).
